errors.onlyText: You must enter only text without number

password.atLeastOneUpperCase: Password must contain at least one capital letter in Latin
password.atLeastOneLowerCase: Password must contain at least one lowercase letter in Latin
password.noCyrillic: Password can not contain any characters in Cyrillic
password.atLeastOneDigit: Password must contain at least one number
password.minLength: Password must be longer than 5 characters
password.maxLength: Password must be less than 100 characters
password.alphaNumeric: Password must contain at least one alphanumeric character

passwordConfirmation.notMatch: Password confirmation does not match password

errors.futureDate: The date must not be later than the current date
